div.h1: TCP Congestion Control: Transition Logic & State Comparison

div.p: Implementation Note: In modern Linux kernels (CUBIC), $ssthresh$ is dynamically calculated based on the window size at the time of congestion. The transitions documented here reflect the standard NewReno behavior (RFC 5681).

ul.li: Exit Condition: cwnd >= ssthresh or Packet Loss
Growth Profile: Linear ($\approx 1$ MSS per RTT)
